dialog: See those red and blue dots floating in the graph? The server can't distinguish them. Pure chaos!
They look so mixed up! How can anyone tell them apart?
Your task is to find a line that separates them. Neura, you have weights in your head — little numbers that tell how much each piece of information is worth.
At first they're random, that's why your line is crooked. Press 'Train' and let experience do its job.
Weights? Random? That sounds... messy. But I'm ready to learn!
